response: provide best jobs positions for this job description: *About [Company Name]* [Company Name] is guided by our belief that humanity is at its best when technology advances the way we live and work. With 450,000 route fiber miles serving customers in more than 60 countries, we deliver the fastest, most secure global platform for applications and data to help businesses, government and communities deliver amazing experiences. Learn more about [Company Name]'s network, edge cloud, security and communication and collaboration solutions and our purpose to further human progress through technology at [website], LinkedIn: /[companyhandle], Twitter: [@companyhandle], Facebook: /[companyhandle], Instagram: @[companyhandle] and YouTube: /[companyhandle]. *The Role* The Structure Loader identifies plant and network facilities in provisioning and inventory systems to complete service assignments. Loads network elements and logical inventory in support systems resulting from capital and expense work activity. Assists multiple service groups by identifying plant facilities, preparing cut-sheets, updating and maintaining assignment and record systems resulting from OSP or ISP work orders, and coordinating certain aspects through completion. *The Main Responsibilities* * Maintains data integrity of inventory systems. * Must effectively partner with all affiliate business units to obtain necessary network information * Handles customer record assignment/switch gating to new equipment during cutovers. * Creates cut-sheets for inside and outside facilities and participates in cutover activity. * Occasionally, participates in first office application trials. * May be assigned to specialized task or focus groups to efficiently support the direction of our company. * Other duties as assigned. *What We Look For in a Candidate* *Minimum Qualifications:* * * High School Diploma or GED. Vocational training in related field, i.e.; computerized records management. One to two years of telecommunications experience or network fundamentals that demonstrate ability to interpret and work with plant facilities and related inventory systems. Ability to distinguish colors on coded records, equipment and facilities. Fluent skills in Excel including building spreadsheets and using macros. Experience working with construction prints, cut sheets, cable schematics, location records/maps and/or Central Office equipment records. Working knowledge of technical requirements associated with service offerings, such as Data, Video, VOIP, etc. Demonstrated ability to grasp new concepts quickly. Experience within the last two years working computer software/business applications that support records inventory and data integrity. Experience that demonstrates excellent interpersonal and communication skills; ability to contribute positively in a team environment. *Preferred Qualifications:* * * Associates Degree in Electronics/Communic
